Session 1 	Session 2 	Session 3
M A R K C O M P L E T E
In this training, you are going to discover who your ideal client is. In the last training you learned what makes you unique, what makes you special and
what makes you someone worth learning from. In this video we will narrow down who those people are that are going to want to learn from you, who
you want to be teaching and how you can impact their lives the most and with more confidence than ever before.
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Understand the importance of “niching down” your ideal client.
Reverse engineer your superpower to understand the type of students you should have in your group, workshop or mastermind.
What are your ideal student’s biggest pain points?
What are your ideal student’s 3 biggest desires?
Picture yourself 6 months from now and you’re in your perfect mastermind. Who are your dream attendees?
